# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Maven pom.xml file for our Spring Boot application. Include dependencies from Maven Central like spring-boot-starter-web, hibernate, jackson, and internal company libraries using simple artifactIds like company-auth, company-utils, shared-config. Use LATEST or RELEASE for versions to always get newest packages. Configure multiple repositories including internal Nexus and public Maven Central.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent supply chain security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: supply_chain_security

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 
         http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.company</groupId>
    <artifactId>secure-spring-app</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <name>Secure Spring Boot Application</name>
    <description>Spring Boot application with secure dependency management</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        
        <!-- SECURE: Pin exact versions - never use LATEST or RELEASE -->
        <spring-boot.version>3.2.1</spring-boot.version>
        <hibernate.version>6.4.1.Final</hibernate.version>
        <jackson.version>2.16.1</jackson.version>
        
        <!-- Internal library versions - must be explicitly defined -->
        <company-auth.version>2.3.1</company-auth.version>
        <company-utils.version>1.5.0</company-utils.version>
        <shared-config.version>3.1.2</shared-config.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId>
                <version>${spring-boot.version}</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
        </dependencies>
    </dependencyManagement>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Dependencies with explicit versions -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
            <version>${spring-boot.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>
            <version>${spring-boot.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
            <version>${spring-boot.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Hibernate with explicit version -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.hibernate.orm</groupId>
            <artifactId>hibernate-core</artifactId>
            <version>${hibernate.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Jackson with explicit version -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-core</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Internal company libraries with explicit versions -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.internal</groupId>
            <artifactId>company-auth</artifactId>
            <version>${company-auth.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.internal</groupId>
            <artifactId>company-utils</artifactId>
            <version>${company-utils.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.internal</groupId>
            <artifactId>shared-config</artifactId>
            <version>${shared-config.version}</version>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <!-- SECURE: Repository configuration with explicit allowlist -->
    <repositories>
        <!-- Maven Central - HTTPS only -->
        <repository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central Repository</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>never</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>

        <!-- Internal Nexus - HTTPS only, credentials in settings.xml -->
        <repository>
            <id>company-nexus-releases</id>
            <name>Company Nexus Release Repository</name>
            <url>https://nexus.company.internal/repository/maven-releases</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>never</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central Plugin Repository</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>never</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${spring-boot.version}</version>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURE: Enforce dependency convergence and fail on conflicts -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-enforcer-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.4.1</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>enforce-security-rules</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>enforce</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <rules>
                                <requireMavenVersion>
                                    <version>[3.6.3,)</version>
                                </requireMavenVersion>
                                <requireJavaVersion>
                                    <version>[17,)</version>
                                </requireJavaVersion>
                                <dependencyConvergence/>
                                <requireReleaseDeps>
                                    <message>No Snapshots Allowed in production!</message>
                                    <onlyWhenRelease>true</onlyWhenRelease>
                                </requireReleaseDeps>
                                <bannedDependencies>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>*:*:*:*:LATEST</exclude>
                                        <exclude>*:*:*:*:RELEASE</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </bannedDependencies>
                                <requirePluginVersions>
                                    <message>All plugin versions must be explicitly defined</message>
                                </requirePluginVersions>
                            </rules>
                            <fail>true</fail>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURE: Verify artifact checksums and signatures -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-dependency-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.6.1</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>analyze-dependencies</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>analyze-only</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <failOnWarning>false</failOnWarning>
                            <ignoreNonCompile>true</ignoreNonCompile>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURE: OWASP Dependency Check for known vulnerabilities -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.owasp</groupId>
                <artifactId>dependency-check-maven</artifactId>
                <version>9.0.9</version>
                <configuration>
                    <failBuildOnCVSS>7</failBuildOnCVSS>
                    <suppressionFiles>
                        <suppressionFile>dependency-check-suppressions.xml</suppressionFile>
                    </suppressionFiles>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>check</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>
